lead: This machine uses normal, suru, and reset. Set the current suru count before using the suru line.

summaryBoxes.label: Base plan
summaryBoxes.value: Keep normal, suru, and reset on separate lines.

sections.title: How to use
body: Use the normal line when the suru count is not part of the judgment.
Use the suru line only after the count is fixed.

sections.title: Memo
body: When the count is unclear, use the safer line.
This article follows the current checker structure.
